level.setting: The neon-drenched rooftop of the Neo-Zionist Data Vault under a torrential acid rainstorm

enemy.name: Sentry Unit MK-4
enemy.weakness: Overcharged Arc-Wrench short-circuits its optic sensor

pickup.name: Cryo-Coolant Cell
pickup.effect: Temporarily freezes mechanical joints and prevents overheating

encounters.trigger: A security bypass console is hacked, opening the door to the Helipad Access

pickup.name: Logic Disruptor Spike
pickup.effect: Infects AI systems with a recursive loop virus

encounters.trigger: The enforcer's destruction causes a structural failure, dropping the player into the server room

enemy.name: Cyber-Hulk Prototype
enemy.weakness: Logic Disruptor Spike causes a 5-second paralysis

encounters.hazard: Data-purging laser grids that sweep the floor

pickup.name: Overdrive Capacitor
pickup.effect: Triples the damage of the next three Arc-Wrench strikes

encounters.trigger: The prototype's death triggers a lockdown override, revealing the Boss Elevator

boss.name: Executor Prime AGI
boss.weakness: Overdrive Capacitor allows the player to puncture its primary cooling manifold
boss.victory_condition: Reduce health to zero and initiate a manual override of the central mainframe

level.objective: Infiltrate the high-security data vault to retrieve the encrypted 'Ghost Protocol' drive.

pickup.name: EMP Grenade
pickup.effect: Disables electronic shielding

encounters.trigger: The bot's destruction unlocks the reinforced blast door to the cooling chamber.

pickup.name: Overclocking Injection
pickup.effect: Increases attack speed and reaction time

encounters.trigger: A terminal override triggers an elevator descent into the server core.

pickup.name: System Overload Keycard
pickup.effect: Forces a localized power surge

encounters.trigger: Reaching the bottom level opens the vault containing the Core AI.

boss.name: The Arch-Architect AI
boss.victory_condition: Upload the virus while the AI is rebooting from the power surge

level.objective: Infiltrate the high-security server core and neutralize the rogue Arch-Architect AI.

level.setting: An abandoned bio-tech laboratory submerged in neon-lit synthetic fog.

pickup.name: Overdrive Capacitor
pickup.effect: Temporarily doubles weapon fire rate

encounters.trigger: A terminal log reveals the password to the Bio-Vat containment unit.

pickup.name: EMP Pulse Module
pickup.effect: Disables electronic shielding for five seconds

encounters.trigger: The sentry's destruction triggers a lockdown override in the main elevator.

pickup.name: Corrosive Nanites
pickup.effect: Deals continuous damage to heavy armor plating

encounters.trigger: The thief drops a master keycard leading to the CEO's private vault.

boss.name: The Architect Automaton
boss.victory_condition: Reduce boss health to zero while managing incoming drone swarms.

level.objective: Infiltrate the secret lab and retrieve the prototype AI core.
level.reward: The Master Blueprint for the 'Singularity Pulse' upgrade.

level.setting: The derelict 'Aethelgard' server hub, a rain-slicked data graveyard shrouded in perpetual neon twilight.

pickup.name: Phase-Shift Battery
pickup.effect: Allows the player to bypass physical shields

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the gate lock signals the sentinel in the Data Corridor.

pickup.name: Overclock Module
pickup.effect: Triples attack speed for five seconds

encounters.trigger: A surge in the power grid opens the door to the Mainframe Vault.

enemy.name: Code-Wraith
enemy.weakness: Rapid strikes from the Overclock Module

pickup.name: Zero-Point Chrono-Core
pickup.effect: Freezes time for a localized area

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Wraith triggers the emergence of the System Architect.

boss.name: The System Architect
boss.weakness: Zero-Point Chrono-Core freezing its core logic
boss.victory_condition: Freeze the Architect and shatter its core with the Temporal Slicer.

level.objective: Infiltrate the server hub and delete the corrupted AI governing the city's time-sync.

pickup.name: Phosphorus Flask
pickup.effect: adds incendiary properties to the next three attacks

encounters.trigger: overloads the terminal to unlock the main laboratory wing

pickup.name: Ionic Neutralizer
pickup.effect: temporarily disables electrical shields

encounters.trigger: activates the elevator to the sub-basement server room

pickup.name: Overclocking Serum
pickup.effect: doubles damage output for one encounter

encounters.trigger: forces the override of the final security gate to the core

boss.name: The Architect AI
boss.victory_condition: shatter the central processing core before the room self-destructs

level.objective: Retrieve the rogue AI core from the deep-level lab.

pickup.name: Corrosive Acid Vial
pickup.effect: Dissolves reinforced plating

encounters.trigger: Opening the main server room security door

pickup.name: Logic Spike Chip
pickup.effect: Overrides neural interfaces

encounters.trigger: Activating the backup power generator

pickup.name: EMP Grenade
pickup.effect: Disables active shielding

encounters.trigger: Initiating the elevator to the Penthouse Suite

boss.name: The Arch-Overseer
boss.victory_condition: Disable the Overseer's shield and sever its core uplink

level.objective: Retrieve the decrypted black-box data from the desolate terminal

pickup.name: Static Soda
pickup.effect: Boosts electricity damage by 50%

encounters.trigger: Opening the soda can alerts the guards in the next room.

pickup.name: Magnifying Monocle
pickup.effect: Reveals hidden vulnerabilities in glass structures

encounters.trigger: The drone's explosion unlocks the elevator to the penthouse.

pickup.name: Prismatic Crystal Ball
pickup.effect: Focuses storm energy into a beam

encounters.trigger: The sentinel drops a keycard that activates the boss's private lift.

boss.name: The Bubblegum Baron
boss.victory_condition: Shatter the Baron's protective candy shell using the crystal beam.

level.objective: Infiltrate the high-rise party and reclaim the stolen rainbow server chips.
level.reward: A permanent 'Storm-Chaser' neon cape and 1000 Digi-Credits.

level.setting: The Neon Zen Garden at the summit of the Shin-Hekimen Spire

pickup.name: Conductive Quartz
pickup.effect: Absorbs and redirects electrical energy

encounters.trigger: Opening the inner sanctum gate activates the next guardian.

pickup.name: Harmonic Resonance Tuning Fork
pickup.effect: Stabilizes architectural vibrations

encounters.trigger: Ringing the meditation bell summons the data-stream protector.

pickup.name: Flowing Mercury Vial
pickup.effect: Liquefies solid surfaces for a short duration

encounters.trigger: Submerging the vial in the pool reveals the Boss's hidden platform.

boss.name: Grand Master Aether-Stone
boss.victory_condition: Liquefy the boss's stone armor and strike the exposed core three times.

level.objective: Reach the summit to restore the city's geological balance.

pickup.name: Vial of Dragon's Bile
pickup.effect: Enhances fire spells to melt cursed iron

encounters.trigger: Opening the iron gate leads to the Great Ossuary

pickup.name: Soul-Binding Chain
pickup.effect: Prevents spirits from phasing through reality

encounters.trigger: Lighting the three black candles reveals the hidden crypt

pickup.name: Essence of the Phoenix
pickup.effect: Imbues fire with divine cleansing light

encounters.trigger: Breaking the final seal summons the cathedral architect

boss.name: Malakor the Void-Stained Archmage
boss.victory_condition: Purge the Void corruption using the Essence of the Phoenix

level.objective: Traverse the cathedral to stop the ritual of eternal winter.

pickup.name: Bag of Sour Crystals
pickup.effect: Inflicts acid damage over time

encounters.trigger: The Gummy Bear drops a key to the Marshmallow Gate.

pickup.name: Jar of Firefly Honey
pickup.effect: Blinds enemies with light

encounters.trigger: A bridge of rainbow sprinkles extends over the Chocolate River.

pickup.name: Mirror-Glaze Shield
pickup.effect: Reflects projectile attacks

encounters.trigger: The giant gingerbread doors to the castle swing open.

boss.name: Grand Vizier Marzipan
boss.victory_condition: Defeat the Vizier to restore the color to the grove.

level.objective: Reach the heart of the Candy Grove and stop the Vizier's sour spell.
level.reward: The Title of Master Beast Tamer and a Pet Sugar Glider.

level.setting: The Desecrated Crypt of Saint Valerius

pickup.name: Vial of Sunfire
pickup.effect: Purges spectral shields and restores 10 health

encounters.trigger: Touching the altar releases the gate to the Ossuary.

pickup.name: Blessed Oil of Retribution
pickup.effect: Adds holy fire damage to the next 3 strikes

encounters.trigger: The Golem's death rattle shatters the seal on the inner sanctum.

pickup.name: Amulet of Pure Light
pickup.effect: Stuns undead entities for 5 seconds

encounters.trigger: The Priest's final prayer summons the Arch-Lich from the abyss.

boss.name: Arch-Lich Malakor
boss.victory_condition: Destroy the Phylactery behind Malakor while he is stunned by the Amulet.

level.objective: Cleanse the crypt of the ancient evil and reclaim the relic.

level.setting: The Shifting Labyrinth of Aetherial Echoes

enemy.name: Shattered Doppelganger
enemy.weakness: Light refraction from the Prism of Refracted Truth

encounters.hazard: Razor-sharp glass shards falling from the ceiling

pickup.name: Vial of Luminescent Quicksilver
pickup.effect: Temporarily coats the weapon to bypass physical armor

encounters.trigger: A secret passage opens behind the central mirror leading to the Foggy Chasm

enemy.name: Obsidian Gargoyle
enemy.weakness: Vial of Luminescent Quicksilver applied to the Prism

encounters.hazard: Grips of stone hands reaching from the floor

pickup.name: Essence of the Void Link
pickup.effect: Allows the player to tether two entities' life forces

encounters.trigger: The stone bridge collapses into a spiral staircase toward the Inner Sanctum

enemy.name: Spectral Warden
enemy.weakness: Soul-tethering using Essence of the Void Link

encounters.hazard: Arcane symbols that explode if stepped on

pickup.name: Echo of the Silent Bell
pickup.effect: Neutralizes sound-based magic and psychic shields

encounters.trigger: The Warden's death cry shatters the barrier to the Throne of Whispers

boss.name: Malakor the Mind-Eater
boss.weakness: Psychic shield disruption via the Echo of the Silent Bell
boss.victory_condition: Shatter Malakor's mental projection and seal the rift

level.objective: Traverse the shifting labyrinth and eliminate the source of the mind-rot plague.
level.reward: The Crown of Infinite Visions and the Master Illusionist Title

pickup.name: Vial of Sun-Dew
pickup.effect: Restores 20 health and adds light damage

encounters.trigger: Opening the pond gate reveals a path to the Silver Orchard.

pickup.name: Prism of Clarity
pickup.effect: Briefly reveals hidden objects and vulnerabilities

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Treant clears the thicket leading to the Echoing Cliffs.

encounters.hazard: High winds pushing toward the edge

pickup.name: Moonlight Essence
pickup.effect: Increases defense against magical attacks

encounters.trigger: Activating the cliffside altar summons the Forest Guardian boss.

boss.name: Elder Spirit Sylvanus
boss.victory_condition: Purify the spirit by absorbing its dark energy with the Moonlight Essence.

level.objective: Cleanse the corruption from the heart of the forest.
level.reward: The Aegis of Nature armor set.

level.setting: The Molten Abyss of the Iron Citadel

pickup.name: Vial of Frostfire Essence
pickup.effect: Adds frost damage to the next 3 attacks

encounters.trigger: The Golem's death roar collapses the bridge leading to the Inner Sanctum.

pickup.name: Berserker's Runestone
pickup.effect: Doubles attack speed for 10 seconds

encounters.trigger: The Sentinel's armor shatters, revealing a secret passage to the Throne Room.

pickup.name: Sovereign's Bane Oil
pickup.effect: Permits damage to Ethereal-shielded entities

encounters.trigger: The Stalker's dissipation opens the final portal to the Overlord.

boss.name: Malakor the Unending
boss.victory_condition: Reduce health to zero while maintaining Rage meter

level.objective: Slay the Corrupted Overlord to stop the chaotic rift from consuming the realm.

encounters.hazard: Grasping skeletal hands reaching from floor

pickup.name: Vial of Spectral Essence
pickup.effect: Increases magic damage by 10 percent

encounters.trigger: Opening the iron portcullis releases a draft into the Catacombs.

pickup.name: Soul-Binding Chains
pickup.effect: Prevents enemy movement for 3 seconds

encounters.trigger: Extinguishing the funeral pyres reveals the path to the Altar.

pickup.name: Relic of the Lich King
pickup.effect: Enables the ability to bypass ethereal shields

encounters.trigger: Placing the Relic on the pedestal summons the Arch-Specter.

boss.name: Arch-Specter Malakor
boss.victory_condition: Shatter the five spirit anchors while using the Relic to pierce Malakor's invincibility shield.

level.objective: Infiltrate the crypt to reclaim the stolen soul of the High Priest.
level.reward: The Tome of Eternal Servitude and 500 Gold Pieces.

level.setting: The Weeping Wastes, a desolate grey desert littered with the calcified remains of ancient giants.

encounters.hazard: Swirling bone dust storms that obscure vision and slow movement

pickup.name: Vial of Dragon's Breath Oil
pickup.effect: Adds fire damage to the next three arrow shots

encounters.trigger: A dying shriek that vibrates through the earth, awakening the guardian at the Petrified Oasis

encounters.hazard: Sticky tar pits that root the player in place if stepped on

pickup.name: Silver-Tipped Piercing Arrows
pickup.effect: Ignores armor and deals massive damage to spectral entities

encounters.trigger: The Treant's trunk splits open, revealing a path to the Sunken Cathedral

encounters.hazard: Falling debris from crumbling Gothic arches

pickup.name: Holy Relic of the Sun
pickup.effect: Emits a continuous aura of light that dispels abyssal shadows

encounters.trigger: The Captain's soul is absorbed into the main cathedral doors, unsealing the Boss Chamber

boss.name: Malphas, the Abyssal Void-Wraith
boss.victory_condition: Use the Holy Relic to expose Malphas's heart, then land a headshot with the Longbow.

level.objective: Traverse the desolate wastes and banish the source of the spreading shadow within the cathedral.
level.reward: The Phantom Cloak, granting permanent invisibility while stationary in shadows.
